arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Bologna LIVE match updates and team news from Champions League clash
arts.sum: This is Villa's first game against an Italian club since September 1994 when, having lost 1-0 at Inter Milan in the UEFA Cup first round, they won by the same scoreline at Villa Park and progressed 4-3 on penalties. Villa's only other win against Serie A sides – indeed, the only other of their six games they have not lost – was a 2-0 home victory against Inter in the second round of the same competition in 1990/91.
